zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Beauchamp於1130年之後出生在英國時，她的父親Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp8895歲，母親Maud de Braose8884歲。她於大約1162年與Ralph de Sudeley在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1192年之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Beauchamp于1130年之后出生在英国时，她的父亲Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp8895岁，母亲Maud de Braose8884岁。她于大约1162年与Ralph de Sudeley在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1192年之后，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Beauchamp was born after 1130, in England, her father, Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp, was 8895 and her mother, Maud de Braose, was 8884. She married Ralph de Sudeley about 1162, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1192, and was buried in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Beauchamp est née après 1130, à Angleterre, son père, Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp, avait 8895 ans et sa mère, Maud de Braose, avait 8884 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Sudeley environ 1162, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1192, et a été enterrée à Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Beauchamp nach 1130 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp 8895 und ihre Mutter Maud de Braose 8884. Sie hat um 1162 in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Sudeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1192 und wurde in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Beauchamp è nata il dopo il 1130 nel England, sua padre, Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp, aveva 8895 anni e sua madre, Maud de Braose, aveva 8884 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Sudeley circa 1162, nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1192, e fu sepolta a Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Beauchampが1130年以後にイギリスで生まれた時，父Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchampは8895歳，母Maud de Braoseは8884歳であった。約1162年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルでRalph de Sudeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1192年以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィンチコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Beauchamp(이)가 1130년 이후 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp(은)는 8895세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Braose(은)는 8884세였다. 그녀는 대략 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 Ralph de Sudeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1192년 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 윈ch코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Beauchamp nasceu após 1130, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp, tinha 8895 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Braose, tinha 8884 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Sudeley aproximadamente 1162, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1192, e foi sepultada em Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Beauchamp родилась после 1130 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp было 8895 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Braose, 8884. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Sudeley около 1162 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1192 г. и была похоронена в местности винчкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Beauchamp nació después de 1130, en Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William De Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp, tenía 8895 años y su mamá, Maud de Braose, tenía 8884 años. Se casó con Ralph de Sudeley aproximadamente 1162, en Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1192, y fue sepultada en Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
